raw: {"perspective": "CTO Watchdog", "findings": [{"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "CEO's work schedule", "issue": "Irregular work hours may impact sustainability", "recommended_fix": "Establish a consistent work schedule to ensure self-care and sustainability"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "Resource management", "issue": "Limited budget and reliance on credit may pose financial risks", "recommended_fix": "Explore alternative funding options and prioritize cost management"}], "overall_verdict": "pass", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Irregular work hours may impact sustainability
findings.recommended_fix: Establish a consistent work schedule to ensure self-care and sustainability
